violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the back room and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The floors below the aisles in the sales area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
